name: Investment Checklist
description_en: Buffett-style pre-purchase checklist: business, moat, management, financials, valuation, and decisive pass/fail verdicts.
description_zh: 巴菲特式买入前 Checklist：生意、护城河、管理层、财务、估值，并给出明确的通过/不通过判断。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It runs a disciplined Buffett-style checklist before buying, forcing explicit pass/fail/conditional grades and a final buy/hold/sell recommendation.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。买入前执行严格的巴菲特式 Checklist，强制给出明确的通过/不通过/有条件评级，以及最终买入/持有/卖出建议。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from tools/ and performs web searches for company data. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具，并执行网络搜索获取公司数据。无需外部账号。
